summary: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence from Illinois Institute of Technology with full-stack engineering experience shipping production systems end-to-end — from design to rollout. Built a real-time AI interview platform with React, TypeScript, Node.js, Express, and PostgreSQL deployed on AWS and Railway, and a production RAG developer tool with a FastAPI backend, React frontend, CI/CD on GitHub Actions, and automated test suites. Comfortable owning projects from ideation through customer delivery, integrating LLMs into backend pipelines for real-world data transformation tasks, and moving fast without sacrificing reliability.

skills.languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, SQL, Go, Java (familiar), C++ (familiar)
skills.ml: Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), LangChain, OpenAI API, Anthropic Claude API, Prompt Engineering, NLP, HuggingFace Transformers, Vector Embeddings, Semantic Search
skills.infra: AWS (ECS, Lambda, Fargate), Node.js, FastAPI, Express.js, RESTful APIs, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), PostgreSQL, DynamoDB, Supabase, Pinecone, Railway, Vercel, Git
